name: Campbells Forest Solar Farm
operational_notes: Chinese-owned Risen Energy Australia. CIS T1 award 205 MW solar + 20 MWh co-located BESS (per developer). GPS approved by AEMO. Connection contract targeted Q4 2025. EPC engagement underway. Financial close TARGETED Q4 2025 / Q1 2026 per developer — no public FC confirmation as of Jul 2026. Prior AURES record showed contract_status=fid; downgraded to awarded 2026-07-16 pending public FC confirmation.

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: GPS approved by AEMO; connection contract Q4 2025 target. EPC engagement underway. Developer targeted FC Q4 2025, construction Q1 2026 — no public FC confirmation as of Jul 2026. Status downgraded from fid to awarded pending public verification. Medium confidence.
